status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
official_name: Autoridade Nacional de Proteção de Dados
notes: Brazil's data-protection regulator, created by Lei 13.853/2019, operationalized 2020, linked to the Ministry of Justice and Public Security. Enforces the LGPD (secid:regulation/planalto.gov.br/lgpd), issues regulatory norms/guidance, handles complaints/sanctions. Formally converted from 'Autoridade' to 'Agência' by Provisional Measure MP 1.317/2025 (September 17, 2025) while keeping the ANPD acronym.
